---
name: "Contribution Proposal"
about: "Propose a larger change before starting work"
title: "[Proposal] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## What do you want to change?

Describe the change in 2–3 sentences.

## Which quality criterion does this serve?

At least one must apply ([POLICY.md §8](../../POLICY.md)):

- [ ] Reduces a core uncertainty
- [ ] Improves signal quality (precision or recall)
- [ ] Increases credibility of findings
- [ ] Increases actionability of findings
- [ ] Improves trend capability
- [ ] Improves adoptability

## Expected impact

What improves for users? Be specific (e.g., "AVS false-positive rate on
monorepos drops because ...").

## Proposed approach

How would you implement this? Which files are affected?

## What this does NOT do

List explicit non-goals to keep scope small.

## Would you like to implement this?

- [ ] Yes, I plan to open a PR
- [ ] No, just proposing the idea
